reviews.comment: He tested us on concepts we learned right before the test and gave homework on those concepts after the test. Some of the homework questions content didn't seem covered in lectures/or the book. TA Barely provided any feedback on homework and is ridiculously tough. Nice guy to talk to, but lectures are read straight from powerpoint in monotone.
Very Very tough Grader. It is very difficult to pass in this course.
reviews.ratingTags: Tough Grader--LOTS OF HOMEWORK--GRADED BY FEW THINGS

reviews.comment: Behrooz is one of the worst professor's I've ever had at WSU and I would NOT recommend him to anyone. Lecture consisted of reading from the slides, that were NOT helpful for homework/exams. Homework was difficult to complete because the lecture slides weren't helpful and the lecture slides are all that's covered in class. Grading was very harsh!!!!

Behrooz is an extremely tough grader. The solutions he posts for the homework assignments are a complete 180 from the lectures. The way he teaches you how to solve things in class is not how he wants them solved on the homework. His final is worth 45% of the grade, and the homework are 100 points each (with no partial credit).
He know's his stuff, and leaves you to your own devices if you want. If you seek out his help with something you will find out how insanely intelligent he is.
reviews.ratingTags: Gives good feedback--Respected--GRADED BY FEW THINGS
